hero.name: Benji Canones
hero.tagline: Architecting RAG systems and resilient backend pipelines.

about.mainDescription: I build scalable backend systems, AI-integrated pipelines, and modern interactive frontends. My journey into programming started with curiosity about how complex applications abstract their underlying architecture so elegantly. Over the years, I've honed my skills deeply in distributed systems, RESTful microservices, and large-scale data processing leveraging modern frameworks like FastAPI, React, and various LLM orchestrators. I believe in clean code, testing, and continuous learning, often spending hours diving into the source code of popular open-source libraries to understand their paradigms. Outside of coding, I am passionate about mentoring students transitioning into tech, sharing my philosophy on software design patterns.

moreAboutMe.description: I believe in clean code and architectural transparency. Building tools should not mean obfuscating complexity unfairly. A well-designed system speaks for itself.
When I'm not coding backend systems, I'm exploring hardware and design.

projectSummaries.title: IntelliChat RAG Backend
projectSummaries.shortDescription: A developer-first backend for custom RAG systems capable of large scale vector ingestions seamlessly.

projectSummaries.title: Neural Document Parser API
projectSummaries.shortDescription: High-throughput OCR and unstructured data extraction built on top of robust multimodal pipelines API endpoints.

projectSummaries.title: Go Stream Engine
projectSummaries.shortDescription: Low-latency message streaming service crafted purely via WebSockets aiming for zero-dependency high concurrency usage.

blogPreview.description: Welcome to my project deep dives. Here I document the architecture decisions, challenges, and code structures behind my implementations.

deepDives.title: Architecture Overview
deepDives.description: This project required custom vector chunking to handle large PDF ingestions without memory overflow...

deepDives.title: Multimodal Vector Search Pipeline
deepDives.description:
Integrating a **multimodal** search using CLIP embeddings. The process involved vectorizing the images and aligning them with the text embeddings.

```python
# Multimodal Embedding
def embed_multimodal(image_path, text):
    image_emb = clip_model.embed_image(image_path)
    text_emb = clip_model.embed_text(text)
    return concatenate(image_emb, text_emb)
```

It improved the visual search capabilities by 40% based on our benchmark suite.

projectBlogs.title: Optimizing Vector Search Latency
projectBlogs.description:
Switched from a standard HNSW index to a quantized vector search, reducing retrieval latency by 35%.

```python

    pass
```

projectBlogs.title: Implementing Multimodal RAG
projectBlogs.description:
Integrated visual grounding capability. The model can now analyze images alongside text, improving query accuracy for documents with charts.

projectBlogs.title: Fixing the Context Window Issue
projectBlogs.description: Noticed that overflowing the context window caused hallucination. Implemented a dynamic token truncation algorithm that preserves the most relevant chunks.

projectBlogs.title: Authentication Integration
projectBlogs.description: Adding JWT-based authentication to secure the API. Used FastAPI's `OAuth2PasswordBearer` for quick implementation.

projectBlogs.title: Initial Database Setup
projectBlogs.description: Set up PostgreSQL and configured `pgvector`. Wrote the initial Alembic migration scripts.

Documentation.description: High-level flow from API gateway to Vector DB.

technologies.title: Database Architecture
technologies.description: Storing massive unstructured documents alongside embeddings requires an ACID-compliant engine.

techStacks.description: PostgreSQL was utilized alongside the `pgvector` extension. We selected PostgreSQL 16 because of its native SIMD optimizations for vector similarity matching.

technologies.title: Backend Services
technologies.description: Performance and rapid iteration was necessary because RAG logic evolves constantly with prompt adjustments.

techStacks.description: Python's rich AI ecosystem made it the obvious choice for handling tokenization pipelines.
FastAPI provides synchronous and asynchronous interface mixing, which we strictly needed because embedding relies on remote APIs.

technologies.title: Frontend App
technologies.description: The administrative dashboard needed highly interactive visualizations for document node graphs.

techStacks.description: Used modern TypeScript for static checks and cleaner refactors.
React powered by Vite ensures ultra-fast HMR in development.

technologies.title: AI & Orchestration
technologies.description: Connecting standard application flows with nondeterministic LLMs required a deterministic intermediary.

techStacks.description: LangChain's graph primitives allowed us to build custom memory schemas across chat sessions.

technologies.title: Message Brokering
technologies.description: Document parsing is an extensive background process.

techStacks.description: Redis handles our Celery task queues reliably, while additionally caching repetitive queries to save OpenAI token limits.

technologies.title: Containerization
technologies.description: Docker streamlines deployment from staging to production reliably.

techStacks.description: Multi-stage Dockerfiles optimized image sizes effectively down to just over 150MB, stripping all unneeded GCC compile dependencies.

technologies.title: Core Compute Cloud
technologies.description: Cloud hosting requires resilience for horizontal scaling of worker nodes.

techStacks.description: AWS ECS combined with Fargate allows us to allocate hardware on the fly precisely as queuing backlogs expand.

technologies.title: Edge Middleware
technologies.description: Serving static bundles seamlessly closer to consumers.

techStacks.description: Vercel acts as our Edge CDN for Next.js, handling ISR securely to ensure load isn't placed constantly on the Postgres instance.
